title: Rude Buster Mod
description: Adds the susie's rude buster attack from Deltarune
body:
> You want to make attacks as powerful as susie? Well this mod is for you
> 
- "_now you can **DESTROY** your enemies_"

> Rude Buster Mod it's a simple mod that adds the above mentioned (rude buster _almost_ the same as the original)

## Axe model, used for shooting the rude buster

![Sharp Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19527a885ef02ea0d879bac011a487b5ff4d73a0.jpeg)

> ## Axe recipe

![Sharp Axe Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/948e8a5b4ed89f8fdc556f9a7e61eb6f10c97fc6.png)

**Dependences - None required**

**Credits - Toby Fox, creator of DELTARUNE**
